title: Memory
description: Persistent memory keeps selected project facts available across turns and sessions.

steps.annotation: A cheap index is always available to the system prompt.

steps.content: Use the repository's preferred test command.
steps.annotation: The user references a fact that may have been learned earlier.

steps.content: Selected memory: project_facts.md -> preferred_test_command=npm run test:unit
steps.annotation: Relevant memory content is injected selectively.
The agent acts on durable knowledge without asking again.
After the turn, new durable facts can be extracted from the original conversation.
